info.title: API de Rewrite
info.summary: Referencia de la API de proyectos (Projects, API Keys, Templates, Webhooks).
info.description:
Referencia publica completa de los endpoints de nivel proyecto en Rewrite API v1.

Todos los endpoints devuelven un sobre consistente (`ok`, `data` y `cursor` opcional).
Usa bearer token (API key) con scopes o sesion autenticada por cookie.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Metadatos del proyecto y ciclo de vida.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Crear, listar y revocar API keys de proyecto.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Gestiona plantillas SMS reutilizables con variables.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Registra y gestiona webhooks de eventos de entrega.

get.description:
Devuelve las API keys activas del proyecto con paginacion por cursor.

Usa `limit`, `after` y `before` para paginar.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"

api_keys = client.api_keys.list(project_id, {"limit": 20})

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';

$apiKeys = $rewrite->apiKeys->list($projectId, [
  'limit' => 20,
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"

api_keys = rewrite.api_keys.list(project_id, limit: 20)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.apiKeys.ListApiKeysOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"

  val apiKeys = rewrite.apiKeys.list(
    projectId,
    ListApiKeysOptions(limit = 20)
  )

  println(apiKeys)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
C#

post.description: Crea una API key del proyecto y devuelve el secreto una sola vez. Guardalo de forma segura.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';

$apiKey = $rewrite->apiKeys->create([
  'project' => $projectId,
  'name' => 'Jobs worker',
  'scopes' => ['project:templates:read', 'projects:webhooks:read'],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"

api_key = rewrite.api_keys.create(
  project: project_id,
  name: "Jobs worker",
  scopes: ["project:templates:read", "projects:webhooks:read"]
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.apiKeys.CreateApiKeyOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"

  val apiKey = rewrite.apiKeys.create(
    CreateApiKeyOptions(
      project = projectId,
      name = "Jobs worker",
      scopes = listOf("project:templates:read", "projects:webhooks:read")
    )
  )

  println(apiKey)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
C#

delete.description: Revoca una API key inmediatamente por key id.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"
api_key_id = "748395130237498400"

client.api_keys.delete(api_key_id, project_id)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';
$apiKeyId = '748395130237498400';

$rewrite->apiKeys->delete($apiKeyId, $projectId);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"
api_key_id = "748395130237498400"

rewrite.api_keys.delete(api_key_id, project_id)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"
  val apiKeyId = "748395130237498400"

  rewrite.apiKeys.delete(apiKeyId, projectId)
}

get.description:
Lista las plantillas del proyecto con paginacion por cursor.

Usa `limit`, `after` y `before` para paginar.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"

templates = client.templates.list(project_id, {"limit": 20})

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';

$templates = $rewrite->templates->list($projectId, [
  'limit' => 20,
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"

templates = rewrite.templates.list(project_id, limit: 20)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.ListTemplatesOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"

  val templates = rewrite.templates.list(
    projectId,
    ListTemplatesOptions(limit = 20)
  )

  println(templates)
}

value.name: order_shipped
value.content: Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.

post.description: Crea una plantilla reutilizable con variables y valores de fallback.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"

template = client.templates.create(
    {
        "project": project_id,
        "name": "order_shipped",
        "content": "Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.",
        "variables": [
            {"name": "first_name", "fallback": "customer"},
            {"name": "order_id", "fallback": "0000"},
        ],
    }
)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';

$template = $rewrite->templates->create([
  'project' => $projectId,
  'name' => 'order_shipped',
  'content' => 'Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.',
  'variables' => [
    ['name' => 'first_name', 'fallback' => 'customer'],
    ['name' => 'order_id', 'fallback' => '0000'],
  ],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"

template = rewrite.templates.create(
  project: project_id,
  name: "order_shipped",
  content: "Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.",
  variables: [
    { name: "first_name", fallback: "customer" },
    { name: "order_id", fallback: "0000" }
  ]
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.CreateTemplateOptions
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.TemplateVariable

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"

  val template = rewrite.templates.create(
    CreateTemplateOptions(
      project = projectId,
      name = "order_shipped",
      content = "Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.",
      variables = listOf(
        TemplateVariable(name = "first_name", fallback = "customer"),
        TemplateVariable(name = "order_id", fallback = "0000")
      )
    )
  )

  println(template)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
x-codeSamples.source:
import Foundation
import RewriteSDK

let rewrite = Rewrite(apiKey: ProcessInfo.processInfo.environment["REWRITE_API_KEY"] ?? "")

let projectId = "748395130237498368"

let template = try await rewrite.templates.create(
  project: projectId,
  name: "order_shipped",
  content: "Hi {{first_name}}, your order {{order_id}} is on the way.",
  variables: [
    TemplateVariable(name: "first_name", fallback: "customer"),
    TemplateVariable(name: "order_id", fallback: "0000")
  ]
)

print(template)

x-codeSamples.label: C#

get.description: Obtiene una plantilla por identificador (template id o template name).

Go

from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

template_identifier = "order_shipped"

template = client.templates.get(template_identifier, project_id)

patch.description: Actualiza parcialmente el contenido de la plantilla y/o sus variables.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"
template_id = "748395130237498500"

template = client.templates.update(
    template_id,
    {
        "project": project_id,
        "content": "Hi {{first_name}}, your package {{order_id}} has shipped.",
        "variables": [
            {"name": "first_name", "fallback": "customer"},
            {"name": "order_id", "fallback": "0000"},
        ],
    }
)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';
$templateId = '748395130237498500';

$template = $rewrite->templates->update($templateId, [
  'project' => $projectId,
  'content' => 'Hi {{first_name}}, your package {{order_id}} has shipped.',
  'variables' => [
    ['name' => 'first_name', 'fallback' => 'customer'],
    ['name' => 'order_id', 'fallback' => '0000'],
  ],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"
template_id = "748395130237498500"

template = rewrite.templates.update(
  template_id,
  project: project_id,
  content: "Hi {{first_name}}, your package {{order_id}} has shipped.",
  variables: [
    { name: "first_name", fallback: "customer" },
    { name: "order_id", fallback: "0000" }
  ]
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.TemplateVariable
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.templates.UpdateTemplateOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"
  val templateId = "748395130237498500"

  val template = rewrite.templates.update(
    templateId,
    UpdateTemplateOptions(
      project = projectId,
      content = "Hi {{first_name}}, your package {{order_id}} has shipped.",
      variables = listOf(
        TemplateVariable(name = "first_name", fallback = "customer"),
        TemplateVariable(name = "order_id", fallback = "0000")
      )
    )
  )

  println(template)
}

print(template)

get.description:
Lista los endpoints webhook configurados para este proyecto.

Usa `limit`, `after` y `before` para paginar.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"

webhooks = client.webhooks.list(project_id, {"limit": 20})

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';

$webhooks = $rewrite->webhooks->list($projectId, [
  'limit' => 20,
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

project_id = "748395130237498368"

webhooks = rewrite.webhooks.list(project_id, limit: 20)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.webhooks.ListWebhooksOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"

  val webhooks = rewrite.webhooks.list(
    projectId,
    ListWebhooksOptions(limit = 20)
  )

  println(webhooks)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
C#

post.description: Crea un endpoint webhook y suscripciones de eventos.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client, WebhookEventType

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"

webhook = client.webhooks.create(
    {
        "project": project_id,
        "name": "Delivery events",
        "endpoint": "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite",
        "events": [
            WebhookEventType.SMS_QUEUED,
            WebhookEventType.SMS_DELIVERED,
            WebhookEventType.SMS_FAILED,
        ],
    }
)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';

$webhook = $rewrite->webhooks->create([
  'project' => $projectId,
  'name' => 'Delivery events',
  'endpoint' => 'https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite',
  'events' => ['sms.queued', 'sms.delivered', 'sms.failed'],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: C#

patch.description: Actualiza endpoint webhook, eventos, nombre o estado.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client, WebhookEventType, WebhookStatus

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

project_id = "748395130237498368"
webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = client.webhooks.update(
    webhook_id,
    {
        "project": project_id,
        "endpoint": "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
        "events": [
            WebhookEventType.SMS_DELIVERED,
            WebhookEventType.SMS_FAILED,
        ],
        "status": WebhookStatus.ACTIVE,
    }
)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$projectId = '748395130237498368';
$webhookId = '748395130237498700';

$webhook = $rewrite->webhooks->update($webhookId, [
  'project' => $projectId,
  'endpoint' => 'https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2',
  'events' => ['sms.delivered', 'sms.failed'],
  'status' => 'ACTIVE',
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.webhooks.UpdateWebhookOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val projectId = "748395130237498368"
  val webhookId = "748395130237498700"

  val webhook = rewrite.webhooks.update(
    webhookId,
    UpdateWebhookOptions(
      project = projectId,
      endpoint = "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
      events = listOf("sms.delivered", "sms.failed"),
      status = "ACTIVE"
    )
  )

  println(webhook)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
x-codeSamples.source:
import Foundation
import RewriteSDK

let rewrite = Rewrite(apiKey: ProcessInfo.processInfo.environment["REWRITE_API_KEY"] ?? "")

let projectId = "748395130237498368"
let webhookId = "748395130237498700"

let webhook = try await rewrite.webhooks.update(
  webhookId,
  project: projectId,
  endpoint: "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
  events: ["sms.delivered", "sms.failed"],
  status: "ACTIVE"
)

print(webhook)

bearerAuth.description: Envia tu API key como `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`.

after.name: after
after.description: ID unico de cursor para obtener elementos despues de este valor.

before.name: before
before.description: ID unico de cursor para obtener elementos antes de este valor.

persist.description: Indica si se puede solicitar otra pagina usando `next`.

next.description: Cursor para solicitar la siguiente pagina (`after`).

OkEmptyResponse.description: Respuesta exitosa. Este endpoint no devuelve datos.

icon.description: Establece `null` para eliminar el icono (cuando se soporte).

ProjectUpdateBody.description: Campos que se pueden actualizar en un proyecto.

prefix.description: Prefijo de clave publica para identificacion.

APIKey.description: Metadatos de API key del proyecto (el secreto no se vuelve a devolver).

ok.description: Indicates whether the API key was created successfully.

id.description: ID of the newly created API key.

key.description: One-time secret API key value. Store it securely; it will not be shown again.

data.description: Details returned once after API key creation.

APIKeyCreateResponse.description: Respuesta de creacion que contiene la clave secreta de un solo uso.

name.description: Clave de variable usada por tu app.

fallback.description: Valor por defecto cuando tu payload no proporciona la variable.

TemplateVariable.description: Variable con nombre usada en el cuerpo de la plantilla.

createdAt.description: Marca de tiempo de creacion UTC.

AuthScope.description:
Permission scope accepted by API keys. Use scoped permissions whenever possible.

Common values:
- `project:read`
- `project:write`
- `project:api_keys:read`
- `project:templates:read`
- `project:templates:write`
- `projects:webhooks:read`
- `projects:webhooks:write`
- `projects:payments:read`
- `*` (full access)
